testcase.name: test_create_staff
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration9.py:84: in test_create_staff assert data["username"] == test_username ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'username'

testcase.name: test_update_staff
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration9.py:107: in test_update_staff assert update_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update staff: {update_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update staff: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","password"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"username":"TEST_update_1775135541","role":"admin"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_pdf_report

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to generate PDF: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration9.py:342: in test_generate_pdf_report assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to generate PDF: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to generate PDF: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
